theme: Grandparents and grandchildren family-story — paper-cut layered cardboard, warm cream sky, Douro river and bridge, heritage plum and gold accents
notes: Runtime hero assets are complete for the five supported locales. Background locale variants are intentionally identical because they contain no embedded text.

heroSlots._doc: Canonical hero slot grammar shared by every style folder. Filenames are lowercase: {slot}.webp, {slot}_{device}.webp, {slot}_{device}_{locale}.webp, person{n}_{locale}.webp. Locale fallback chain at build time: exact locale -> en-US -> unsuffixed -> first available.

assets.usage: PaperCutHero sky band — left floater, in front of cloud_left
assets.description: Blue paper hot-air balloon, papercut style, for the grandparents family-story sky.

assets.usage: PaperCutHero sky band — right floater, in front of cloud_right
assets.description: Golden crescent moon, papercut style, for the grandparents family-story sky.

assets.usage: PaperCutHero sky band — top-left background cloud, behind sky_left
assets.description: Layered warm cream paper cloud behind the hot-air balloon.

assets.usage: PaperCutHero sky band — top-right background cloud, behind sky_right
assets.description: Layered warm cream paper cloud behind the crescent moon.

assets.usage: PaperCutHero sky band — twinkle cluster centered above the page title
assets.description: Warm golden paper star with small sparkle dots.
